title: Add jj fix to commit skill
context: Wire jj fix (format + lint autofix) into the agent commit skill so that code is auto-formatted and lint-fixed before commit message generation. Tools: stylua (Lua), ruff format + ruff check --fix (Python), prettier (TS/JS), shfmt (shell).
architecture: Two components: 1) jj/config.toml gets [fix.tools] entries for all five tools. 2) commit SKILL.md gets a new jj fix step inserted between reflection and commit message generation.

green.description: Add fix.tools entries for stylua, ruff-format, ruff-check, prettier, shfmt with correct commands and file patterns. Validate with `jj config get fix.tools`.

red.description: Write Bun test that creates a temp jj repo with a malformed Lua file, runs `jj fix` without tool config, and expects the file to be fixed — test fails because no fix tools are configured in the temp repo.

green.description: Configure fix tools in the temp repo (via --config flags), run `jj fix`, and assert the malformed file is properly formatted by stylua.
Insert a new step between "update rules" and "generate commit message" in the commit SKILL.md: run `jj fix`, surface errors if it fails. The step says to fix any reported lint errors and re-run.

design.currentState: jj/config.toml has only [user], [ui], [revset-aliases]. No [fix.tools] configured. Commit skill has 3 steps: reflect on findings, update rules, generate message + jj commit. Tests use bun:test framework with *.test.ts files.
design.desiredState: jj/config.toml has [fix.tools] entries for stylua (Lua), ruff format (Python), ruff check --fix (Python), prettier (TS/JS), and shfmt (shell). A Bun integration test verifies 'jj fix' works with the config on a temp repo with deliberately malformed files. Commit skill has a new step between rule updates and commit message generation: run 'jj fix', surface errors if it fails.
design.patterns: Test files use bun:test (describe/it/expect). Integration tests use spawnSync with array args (no shell escaping). Test naming: *.test.ts. jj config is in jj/.config/jj/config.toml. Skill files are markdown at pi/.pi/agent/skills/<name>/SKILL.md.
design.decisions: Five separate fix tools. ruff format and ruff check --fix are separate tools (not combined). ruff check --fix uses plain --fix (not --fix-only) to surface unfixable lint errors as a gate. No explicit retry logic in skill — agent's natural behavior handles error recovery. shfmt covers *.sh and *.bash.
